method: Fresh-eyes audit method per Aevion-Verifiable-AI PR #144 (docs/reports/fresh_eyes_audit_four_repo_20260609.md), applied to the fifth repo (previously out of scope). Confirms and extends PR #144 section 11 open hypothesis.

report.note: Published REDACTED copy (key locators in P4 withheld).

advertised_vs_actual.fossil_source: aevion-shield lean_stats.py: sorry_word_in_code=104, sorry_file_count_proof=32 (verbatim match to advertised 104/32)

strings_quoted_as_data: NIST published the proof. Anthropic shipped the architecture. We built the receipted governance for Frontier AI
Quantum Witness ... Wukong Bell + QGOV Predict tiles
public_site.governance_conflict: QGOV/Wukong named on public site vs Aevion-Verifiable-AI/.claude/rules/quantum-claims.md PUBLIC_RELEASE: HELD

external_citation_status.verification: UNVERIFIED — no general web egress from container; aevion.ai returns HTTP 403 to fetch tool. Not asserted true or false.
external_citation_status.red_gate: paper.md marked INTERNAL DRAFT NOT FOR SUBMISSION, arXiv RED; yet NIST framing is live on public site without the required owner approval.

new_red_finding_other_repo.placeholder_check: 16 distinct hex symbols, max single-symbol frequency 8.9% — genuine high-entropy key material, not a zero-fill stub
new_red_finding_other_repo.finding: Committed ML-DSA-65 private signing key (the certificate scheme behind Aevion's proof-certificate/receipt story). Compromised by definition; grants forgery capability under the affected key_id. Exact path/commit/key_id withheld from this published copy; delivered out-of-band to owner.
new_red_finding_other_repo.remediation_lane: CLEARANCE_REQUIRED (RED) — rotate, re-issue, scrub history, gitignore; NO autonomous action taken

commands_run: git -C ProofOS log/branch/ls-remote (refs, tags, default branch)
grep -oE over docs/assets/index-*.js + docs/index.html (public claim strings)
python3 length+entropy inspection of aevion-shield mldsa key file
git check-ignore <redacted key file> -> NOT IGNORED

tests.lean_build: SKIPPED(env) — elan release channel unreachable (same env limit as PR #144); static inventory used

S2: P9 sole safety obligation is True-stub+sorry
S3: P10 architecture.md external-comms label on RED framing
P11 colony.py/eval harness referenced but absent
